name: Ib'al-Hecahands
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>見えざる誘い手</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>イブト・アル・ヘカトンケイル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When your opponent activates a monster effect, while you control a "Hecahands" monster: Negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that monster, then you can Special Summon the destroyed monster to your field. You can only activate 1 "Ib'al-Hecahands" per turn.
eff: When your opponent activates a monster effect, while you control a "Hecahands" monster: Negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that monster, then you can Special Summon the destroyed monster to your field. You can only activate 1 "Ib'al-Hecahands" per turn.

mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard
Special Summons the opponent's banished monsters
